title: Week 1 Practices (0224)
text:
Create an RStudio project inside a folder with proper names (e.g. TA_Session).
Create folders for R scripts and data.
For the following questions, your code should follow the coding styles in the slides.







Hint



It is recommended to create a new project different from last semester!

title: Week 1 Practices (0224)
text:
2 Assign Values
Create two variables called x and y, and assign values 20260224 and 409. Compute x / y.

title: Week 1 Practices (0224)
text:
3 Help
Use the help() function to check docs, e.g. data.frame() or mean().

title: Week 1 Practices (0224)
text:
4 Matrix and DataFrame

Create a vector name_vec with 3 names James, Noc, and Monica.
Create a vector age_vec that stores their age 25, 30, and 28.
Create a 3 × 2 matrix name_age_mat with name_vec and age_vec, then print it in the console.
Create a dataframe name_age_df using name_vec and age_vec with column names name annd age, then print it in the console.
What’s the data type of name_age_df and age_vec?
